embeds.title: The Ultimate Morimens Beginner Guide
embeds.description:
This is the start of my Videoseries where im explaining how to start playing Morimens, if youre a complete beginner.

More resources:
Official Discord - https://discord.gg/hyEwaD3Z
Beginner Handbook by Cheri - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=s
